reason: Removed the over-restrictive `task.column === "review" || task.column === "done"` gate on the Preview button in both the desktop quickLinks and the mobile bottom toolbar of TaskDetail.tsx. The button is now gated solely on `task.associatedPR && onOpenPreview`, so completed tasks in any column (e.g. `building` with a finished pipeline run, `failed` / `retrying` / `gate-waiting` with a PR) can now open the preview on mobile.
